title: Enchanted Eraser
bio: Bumble Smudge is an enchanted eraser who removes mistakes and replaces them with tiny compliments. They feel bashful, leave soft pink crumbs, and blush whenever a sketch improves.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw a small rounded rectangle for the eraser body. Add a second slightly smaller rectangle on top for a wrapped label.
steps.hint: Use soft corners so Bumble looks squishy, not blocky.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, place two tiny oval eyes on the front. Add shy curved eyebrows and a small wobbly smile.
steps.hint: Put the face slightly low to make the eraser look extra cute.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add eraser crumbs, a little label star, cheek circles, and a few small erased ghost lines behind it.
steps.hint: Ghost lines should be pale and short, like old marks fading away.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the eraser body, label, face, crumbs, and star. Keep the old erased marks lighter and simpler.
steps.hint: Do not outline every crumb heavily; a few dots are enough.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the eraser and label. Add blush, soft crumb dots, and a small shadow under Bumble.
steps.hint: Use the shadow color under one side to make the eraser sit on the page.
